entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA enablement issue
entry.content: Canvas Advance Reporting/EC data works fine, I tried making the 2 dimensions both manually maintained as well as remove the source field as indeed they are not configured (the regular temporary one) and I still get the same. Under Company Status I get "Configuration is not valid. Build Fact Data & Cube will fail. For list of errors use Validation.", if I click Validation all seems OK. Then if I click build I get "Found one cube that already exists and needs to be deleted. Are you sure you want to proceed ?" to which I select yes and then I get the browser error "Application Error An error occurred in processing your request". Please support further... Off topic, for some reason I cannot tag you in the replies. @ just does nothing

entry.title: Re: 401 Unauthorized - Build Apps Unable to Access BTP Destination API
entry.content: Hello Dan Please find requested details attached. I lost 2 complete working days to find solution but nothing is working.

entry.title: How Can I Use the @sap/cds-rfc Plugin?
entry.content:
In June 2024, the node-rfc npm package was archived because SAP was unable to properly transfer ownership to new maintainers, according to the last message found on GitHub. However, in November 2024, the CAP team released a plugin called ABAP RFC. According to the documentation on their website, the cds-rfc plugin allows you to import the API of RFC-enabled function modules from ABAP systems and call these functions in your custom code.

So, my question is, how can I do that? The npmjs repository does not have much documentation, and I wonder if this can be a suitable replacement for the node-rfc. I am still trying to use it, but I haven't succeeded yet. According to the documentation, I need to get a token from https://ui.repositories.cloud.sap/, and after that, I need to create a .npmrc file in the root of my CAP project and include the token I generated previously. Unfortunately, I still can't download the @ SAP-rfc/node-rfc-library package that cds-rfc needs.

 

//...repositories.cloud.sap/:_authToken=...
@sap-rfc:registry=https://...repositories.cloud.sap

entry.title: Why choose SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace over individual visibility platforms
entry.content:
Here we are starting a series of seven posts taking a closer look at why supply chain and logistics professionals leverage SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace for greater logistics visibility and supply chain resilience, as compared to individual external shipment tracking platforms. Each post in this series dives into one of the seven key points highlighted here, providing examples relevant to supply chain, fulfillment, and logistics operations working across localized or global markets.

Reason #1: Connect Once, Collaborate with Many

Seamless collaboration is essential to logistics success, driving much of the efficiency needed to be competitive. However, for manufacturing and distribution companies with sprawling ecosystems of suppliers, carriers, and service providers, managing multiple individual partner connections can quickly become a technical and administrative trap that is hard to escape. Each entity often operates on its own systems, offering other partners the opportunity to integrate with their system, but missing the bigger picture of a common platform that integrates natively with the manufacturers ERP foundation.  Collaboration through a growing list of point-to-point integrations leads to a tangled web of costly technical maintenance and time-consuming training. This not only places a significant burden on IT resources but also hinders agility and responsiveness among core logistics operations.

SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace offers a transformative approach. By connecting once to this network, a manufacturer gains access to an ecosystem of partners, all communicating through a standardized platform and data format. This eliminates the need for numerous custom integrations, not only significantly reducing IT complexity and costs, but also reducing training and swivel-chair processes between portals and systems external to core ERP and securely managed data landscapes. Instead of grappling with disparate systems, SAP’s solutions enable manufacturers to focus on streamlining operations and fostering collaboration, from their ERP and secure corporate system landscape.

For instance, consider a manufacturer sourcing components from various suppliers across continents, or fulfilling customer orders with guaranteed short lead-times. Using SAP's solution, they can seamlessly track shipments from each supplier or to each customer, regardless of their location or carrier, without exporting core business information for the essential business context of a shipment, and without logging into any external systems. This unified view allows for optimized planning and execution, proactive monitoring, and native impact assessment if any shipment delays. 

By employing the "Connect Once, Collaborate with Many" principle, global manufacturing companies can unlock the true potential of their logistics networks. This streamlined approach not only simplifies IT management but also empowers them to build stronger relationships with their partners, enhancing efficiency and responsiveness across the entire supply chain. Stay tuned for our next post, where we'll explore how SAP's solution tackles the challenge of handling disparate data sources.

 

Read more about how SAP customer BSH leverages SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace for customer satisfaction in their fulfillment process. 

Next up, reason #2: Handling Disparate Data Sources.  Check back here for the upcoming link or subscribe to SAP Business Network for Logistics on SAP Community.

entry.title: Re: Cannot Install Crystal reports 2016 on Windows 11
entry.content: Thanks, it's the version I'm using. SAP.com have confirmed this as well.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA failed cube
entry.content: It seems the same: 12/01/2025 15:36:02 ERROR:: [GIRRU: Hana Destination; Code: Hana Writer] (0) =================================================== 12/01/2025 15:36:02 In WstHanaInstanceAgent.ReplenishFromCredServiceWhenToggledOn - Tenant secret read for 33 out of 33 record(s) and replenished in WstHanaInstanceAgent 12/01/2025 15:36:12 ERROR:: [GIRRU: Hana Destination; Code: Hana Writer] (0) =================================================== 12/01/2025 15:36:12 ERROR:: [Hana Destination] (0) Exception occured in Girru: SAP DBTech JDBC: [274]: inserted value too large for column: TrexUpdate failed on table 'BCXT1_OLAP_NEXT:FACT_TABLE_1_TEMP' with error: AttributeEngine: indexed value not within specified range;checkCesu8StringColumn(): max length (100) violated on pos 52, value='Pick n Pay, Shoprite, Absa, Cashbuild, TFG, Truworths, Woolworths, Mr Price Group, Queenspark & Clicks',column 'FACT_TABLE_1_A_37_BRANCH_ID', table '$table$', rc=6959(input position 246,768) 12/01/2025 15:36:12 ERROR:: [Hana Destination [6347]] (-1073450910) InfoHRM.Girru.Components.InputProcessingException: Uncaught exception during input processing; Component=Hana Destination ---> com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.BatchUpdateExceptionSapDB: SAP DBTech JDBC: [274]: inserted value too large for column: TrexUpdate failed on table 'BCXT1_OLAP_NEXT:FACT_TABLE_1_TEMP' with error: AttributeEngine: indexed value not within specified range;checkCesu8StringColumn(): max length (100) violated on pos 52, value='Pick n Pay, Shoprite, Absa, Cashbuild, TFG, Truworths, Woolworths, Mr Price Group, Queenspark & Clicks',column 'FACT_TABLE_1_A_37_BRANCH_ID', table '$table$', rc=6959(input position 246,768) at com.sap.db.jdbc.CallableStatementSapDB.executeBatch() at com.sap.db.jdbc.trace.PreparedStatement.executeBatch() at HanaClientIkvm.IkvmHanaClient.CommitTransaction(Action`1 logger) at InfoHRM.Girru.Components.CoreWorkforce.HanaDestination.HanaWriter.Start(PipelineBuffer buffer) at InfoHRM.Girru.Components.SingleOutputWriter.ProcessInput(Int32 inputID, PipelineBuffer buffer) --- End of inner exception stack trace --- at InfoHRM.Girru.Components.PipelineComponentUtil.ReportDebugInfo(InputProcessingException e, Logger logger) at InfoHRM.Girru.Components.SingleOutputWriter.ProcessInput(Int32 inputID, PipelineBuffer buffer) at Microsoft.SqlServer.Dts.Pipeline.ManagedComponentHost.HostProcessInput(IDTSManagedComponentWrapper100 wrapper, Int32 inputID, IDTSBuffer100 pDTSBuffer, IntPtr bufferWirePacket) 12/01/2025 15:36:12 ERROR:: [SSIS.Pipeline] (-1073450974) SSIS Error Code DTS_E_PROCESSINPUTFAILED. The ProcessInput method on component "Hana Destination" (6347) failed with error code 0x80131500 while processing input "DefaultInput" (6349). The identified component returned an error from the ProcessInput method. The error is specific to the component, but the error is fatal and will cause the Data Flow task to stop running. There may be error messages posted before this with more information about the failure. 12/01/2025 15:36:12 INFORMATION:: [SSIS.Pipeline] (1074016264) Post Execute phase is beginning. 12/01/2025 15:36:12 INFORMATION:: [SSIS.Pipeline] (1074016267) "Hana Destination" wrote 0 rows. 12/01/2025 15:36:12 INFORMATION:: [SSIS.Pipeline] (1074016265) Cleanup phase is beginning. 12/01/2025 15:36:12 2025-01-12 14:36:12 Task Process Initial Workforce (FACT_TABLE_1) (0): TaskHost componented failed. 12/01/2025 15:36:12 2025-01-12 14:36:12 Task Process Initial Workforce (FACT_TABLE_1) (0): Task has completed. 12/01/2025 15:36:12 WARNING:: [] (-2147381246) SSIS Warning Code DTS_W_MAXIMUMERRORCOUNTREACHED. The Execution method succeeded, but the number of errors raised (16) reached the maximum allowed (1); resulting in failure. This occurs when the number of errors reaches the number specified in MaximumErrorCount. Change the MaximumErrorCount or fix the errors. 12/01/2025 15:36:12 PackageRunner errored: Package exited with result Failure (1). 12/01/2025 15:36:12 In PackageRunner Program.Main - Package runner failed for JobId : 'd358df01-d0f0-11ef-8833-c9fb97ee5dfd' with ExitCode : 'packageExecuteError' 12/01/2025 15:36:12 PackageRunner error. Job Id: d358df01-d0f0-11ef-8833-c9fb97ee5dfd, Job Name: Initial WorkforcePackage 2025-01-12 14:23:42Z, Package Name: Workforce Package BCXT1 12/01/2025 15:36:12 PackageRunner error. System.Exception: Failed to execute SSIS package. ---> System.Exception: Package exited with result Failure (1). at PackageRunner.PackageRunner.RunPackage(String userId) in D:\DCE\workspace\WFA\MNL-PatchRelease\GIT\FrontOffice\b2411\WST\PackageRunner\PackageRunner.cs:line 90 --- End of inner exception stack trace --- at PackageRunner.PackageRunner.RunPackage(String userId) in D:\DCE\workspace\WFA\MNL-PatchRelease\GIT\FrontOffice\b2411\WST\PackageRunner\PackageRunner.cs:line 98 at PackageRunner.Program.Main(String[] args) in D:\DCE\workspace\WFA\MNL-PatchRelease\GIT\FrontOffice\b2411\WST\PackageRunner\Program.cs:line 138 12/01/2025 15:36:12 In VaultApi.Shutdown - CredentialServiceProxy is purged 12/01/2025 15:36:12 In PackageRunner Program.Main - Credential service terminated 12/01/2025 15:36:12 Workforce run failed. 12/01/2025 15:36:13 SSIS Error occured for Process Fact Tables 12/01/2025 15:36:13 System.Exception: Failed to execute SSIS package. ---> System.Exception: Package exited with result Failure (1). at PackageRunner.PackageRunner.RunPackage(String userId) in D:\DCE\workspace\WFA\MNL-PatchRelease\GIT\FrontOffice\b2411\WST\PackageRunner\PackageRunner.cs:line 90 --- End of inner exception stack trace --- at PackageRunner.PackageRunner.RunPackage(String userId) in D:\DCE\workspace\WFA\MNL-PatchRelease\GIT\FrontOffice\b2411\WST\PackageRunner\PackageRunner.cs:line 98 at PackageRunner.Program.Main(String[] args) in D:\DCE\workspace\WFA\MNL-PatchRelease\GIT\FrontOffice\b2411\WST\PackageRunner\Program.cs:line 138 12/01/2025 15:36:13 There was an error while executing the package.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA failed cube
entry.content: How do I check that?

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA failed cube
entry.content: I also found this: Creating function wfa_utc_to_tptz_nvarchar_ts (i_value nvarchar(5000) ) RETURNS e_res TIMESTAMP LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT SQL SECURITY INVOKER AS BEGIN DECLARE ts TIMESTAMP; DECLARE EXIT HANDLER FOR SQL_ERROR_CODE 303 e_res = null; ts = CAST( i_value AS SECONDDATE); e_res = (CASE WHEN cast(i_value as timestamp) <= '0001-01-02' THEN '0001-01-01 00:00:00' WHEN cast(i_value as timestamp) >= '9999-12-30' THEN '9999-12-31 23:59:59.999999' ELSE UTCTOLOCAL( cast(i_value as timestamp) , 'Europe/Warsaw','platform') END); END;

but MRP was executed for all MRP Controllers.

Soma

entry.title: Re: ServerCrash
entry.content:
Dear Isaías,

Thank you very much for your reply！

I found the following information in dev_icm：

trc file: "dev_icm", trc level: 1, release: "749"

sysno 01
sid LMP
systemid 390 (AMD/Intel x86_64 with Linux)
relno 7490
patchlevel 0
patchno 600
intno 20160201
make multithreaded, Unicode, 64 bit, optimized

I couldn't find the C-STACK information when the system crashed. The following is the last part of the ICM file, but the crash occurred on January 9th at 10:54:

....
<item>[Thr 140187815347968] Sat Dec 28 23:13:07:627 2024</item>
<item>[Thr 140187815347968] IcmCreateWorkerThreads: created worker thread 90</item>
<item></item>
<item>[Thr 140187110332160] Sat Dec 28 23:15:21:360 2024</item>
<item>[Thr 140187110332160] *** ERROR => MtxLock(7f800aed86a4) failed: 12 [mpixx.c 2191]</item>
<item></item>
<item>[Thr 140187089196800] Sat Dec 28 23:18:08:835 2024</item>
<item>[Thr 140187089196800] *** ERROR => MtxLock(7f800aef36b4) failed: 12 [mpixx.c 2191]</item>
<item></item>
<item>[Thr 140187072288512] Sat Dec 28 23:18:13:286 2024</item>
<item>[Thr 140187072288512] IcmWorkerThread: end worker thread 90</item>
<item></item>
<item>[Thr 140187072816896] Sat Dec 28 23:19:14:327 2024</item>
<item>[Thr 140187072816896] IcmWorkerThread: end worker thread 89</item>
<item></item>
<item>[Thr 140187074402048] Sat Dec 28 23:19:21:071 2024</item>
<item>[Thr 140187074402048] WARNING: re-check of eyecatcher consistency.</item>
<item>[Thr 140187074402048] *** ERROR => MtxLock(7f800aef8244) failed: 12 [mpixx.c 2191]</item>
<item></item>
<item>[Thr 140187073345280] Sat Dec 28 23:20:15:577 2024</item>
<item>[Thr 140187073345280] IcmWorkerThread: end worker thread 88</item>
<item></item>
<item>[Thr 140187114559232] Sat Dec 28 23:21:11:105 2024</item>
</fields>
</SAPControl:ReadLogFileResponse>
</SOAP-ENV:Body>
</SOAP-ENV:Envelope>

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA enablement issue
entry.content:
Hi @abalasescu2 - I cannot help further as I don't have access to that environment.  Feel free to create support ticket, maybe support can help you check in the back-end if there's something missing or not configured.  Maybe purge cache is needed in the back-end.  

Note - I still get the notification maybe because you have tagged me in the original post.  With the new way of posting questions in the community page, please always include a tag "SuccessFactors Workforce Analytics" on your post so I can filter out.  Otherwise it will lost in a pool of questions for other modules.

Thank you.

或者可能是SSCUI 102639指定的。

entry.content: Informed expert

entry.title: Re: Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Master_D...
entry.content: Yes, could you please let us know the specific solution, as it is still also unresolved on our end even after a CPI tenant restart.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA failed cube
entry.content:
Hi @abalasescu2 - It looks like the error is now referring to FACT_TABLE_1_A_37_BRANCH_ID now. You can use "Edit Hierarchies" menu and then use the "Toggle Label" icon on the top to show the ID of the dimension:

Find FACT_TABLE_1|37|1|EN on the left hand side to know which dimension correspond to FACT_TABLE_1_A_37_BRANCH_ID.  Note - A = analysis dimension, S = structural dimension.

Not sure about the error with the UTC conversion, this is done automatically in the back-end.  There is no explicit UTC conversion done in the configuration.

Based on what appear in the log, I think your instance also on DC33 production.  I don't have access to this environment either so cannot check in detail.

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA cloud,How to use the SUM function in CDS?
entry.content: My requirement is to calculate the total outbound quantity, and then join it with other CDS data.Duplicate data will appear when connecting with other CDS using this aggregation specification.

entry.title: FAQ:Can the default account assignment for a specific transaction be changed
entry.content: In the journal entry for goods receipt reversal, the "Purchase Price Variance Loss/Gain" account is displayed, is it possible to change the account for the purchase price variance loss/gain that occurs during goods receipt reversal?

entry.title: Re: The “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event in SAP Analytics Cloud Optimized Story
entry.content:
@N1kh1l , thank you for the comment about BPC default logic.

Regarding your question "how large a data change context will this method support",  we don't set a size limit to the context. It highly depends on the memory of you computer. The size of context can impact script performance. The larger context will result in longer script execution. In addition, the larger data change context translates to a larger calculation scope in data action, which will lead to longer execution times for data action.

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA cloud,How to use the SUM function in CDS?
entry.content: The "SUM" function is not mentioned in "Functions for Calculations", but as shown in the first screenshot, I used the "SUM" function, and in the second screenshot, I used "group by", thus I calculated a summary number.My requirement is to calculate the total outbound quantity, and then join it with other CDS data.I wonder if doing so meets the requirements of SAP and whether it will be prohibited in the future.

entry.title: Re: Doubt for optimize abap code in BADI
entry.content:
Hi

 

The system process all the employees og the following way

For each employee the use can have several records of Organizational Assignment,

I am searching for each employee get the two last record in an internal table and then check in the table HRP1013 the type of employee and if this is equal to 1 do my code logic.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Master_D...
entry.content:
Just confirming that our solution was in this SAP note:

https://me.sap.com/notes/3559293

It was part 2 of the SAP Note solution for us:

If the Message Exchange Pattern is set to "One-Way" AND the Processing Settings is configured to "WS Standard" AND the "Use WS-Addressing" checkbox is either disabled or not available in the UI, then the next step is to raise a support Case with LOD-HCI-PI-OPS where we will add a parameter to the CPI tenant configurations. This new parameter will require a restart of the CPI tenant. Please provide the following details in the support Case: the affected Cloud Integration tenant URL. confirm the required start time of your CPI tenant i.e. immediate restart or within a specific time window of your choice.

entry.title: 回复： FAQ:Can the default account assignment for a specific transaction be changed
entry.content: Ithink the account for the internal transaction key in the Automatic Account Determination configuration can be changed. But how can I check the internal processing key for the journal entry

entry.title: Can SAP BW 7.0 source data from SAP S/4HANA using SAPI?
entry.content:
Can SAP BW 7.0 source data from SAP S/4HANA using SAPI?

We do have a list of deprecated datasources in S/4 HANA (we executed RSA3 in S/4 and found same). But since sap bw 7.0 (database is MSSQL 2012) is not being updated, any other checks we have to undertake? Could we change our source system to sap s/4 for sap bw datasources (we do have a few 3.x datasources as well)? any issues for doing so?

We don't have a case where we are exporting data from sap BW elsewhere.

 Regards,

Ratish

entry.content:

  • User ID
  • Company ID
  • SAP SuccessFactors Base URL

We have attached the information, but we are still facing issues. It always gives an error. We have also followed some KBAs, such as 2558226 - How to make/test the Learning API connection?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Common Connectivity Issues: SAP Logistics Business Network - Freight Collaboration and SAP S/4HA
entry.content:
Hi Mithun, 

This is great reference article. We check this blog before we create any OSS incidents. You have covered most of the mistakes basis/integration team make during setting up the BN4L connection. Please continue the great work and keep adding more errors/solutions.

entry.title: Re: 401 Unauthorized - Build Apps Unable to Access BTP De...
entry.content:
Configure the destination sap_process_automation_service_user_access as (exactly as) described in Configure SAP Build Process Automation Destinations | SAP Help Portal

Notes:

1. Authentication Type

Authentication: OAuth2JWTBearer

2. Don't add additional property

forwardAuthToken: true

entry.title: Re: Extensibility for Manage Prices - Sales
entry.content: Yes, SCFD_EUI is also working for this 'Manage Prices' app.

entry.title: Re: ArchiveLink connection issue: ERROR => NiBufIConnect: non-buffered connect pending after 5000
entry.content: It's been documented in SAP notes (https://www.google.com/search?q=NiBufIConnect%3A+non-buffered+connect+pending%20site:sap.com). If they don't solve, please contact the SAP Support.

entry.content:
Hi Egbert!

I'm trying to achieve something similar but without using a communication user. I need to create a sales order using local API: API_SALES_ORDER but I need the order created by the logged user instead of the comm user. Do you know if that's possible?

Thanks!

entry.title: Cutover activities
entry.content:
Hi Sap Gurus,

Could you tell Cutover Plan & Activities in implementation of SuccessFactors .

with regards,

Amrita

entry.title: Re: How to define the "data-sap-ui-resource-roots" of OPA...
entry.content:
The standard SAPUI5 project expects you to use UI5 tools (ui5 serve) to run the application and tests. If you are using CAP, the middleware for UI5 server is not by default used. It is this middleware that serves '../resources'. When using cds (serve or watch) for running your application, the standard practice is to refer to CDN for UI5 resources; replace '../resources' with 'https://ui5.sap.com/1.120.24/resources' (adjust the version as per your needs). This, additionally, allows for the resources to be cached in the browser. Especially when using BAS, it makes no sense to serve the resources from the local server (in BAS).  

An alternate approach is to run two dev servers, one using cap and another using ui5 tools and configure the backend for ui5 server to point to the CAP server. This is necessary if the application requires access to multiple backends. Even then, I prefer to use CDN unless I am on an island or a plane. 

PS: There is a community plugin (cds-plugin-ui5) that plugs in the UI5 middleware into CAP.  I never used it.

entry.title: Re: tp - DB connect: link to database failed
entry.content: Check the existing forum answers and SAP Notes at https://www.google.com/search?q=Check+of+the+Transport+tool+%22Link+to+database+failed%22%20site:sap.com . I guess that you're out of maintenance so no need to advise contacting the SAP Support if no solution applies.

Hi Experts! I am a newbie to Fiori and ABAP RAP.
I want to set default values in some input elements on the Create Object Page in Fiori UI5. How can I do that?

Thank you

entry.title: MRP Area
entry.content: I already Set parameter in SU3 For MRP Area AS NP00, when i open MD04 MRP Area already set, but when i open Cooispi and then click material list the system direct to MD04 but MRP Area not set as NP00

entry.title: Re: 盤點產生的盤盈虧科目，其所屬的成本中心是判斷什麼設定帶出的？
entry.content:
@OwenLiu 
我在TDD環境上驗證，得出以下結論
1. 1000公司(自行建立出來的Company，非系統預設的demo company)，物料TG11_PH_CW12，該物料主檔的利潤中心為10000000；
驗證的分錄結果，利潤中心確實是帶出【10000000-碩益科技利潤中心】，請參考下圖


2. 6310公司(系統預設的demo company)，物料TG11，該物料主檔的利潤中心為YB700；
驗證的分錄結果，利 潤中心確實是帶出【YB700-貿易貨物】，請參考下圖


但我有疑問，日記帳分錄4900000024中【52501000-存貨差異收益】有帶出【成本中心_63101201-採購和商店1(台灣)】，但4900000031的卻沒有；因此我檢查了SSCUI-102639 ，發現兩家公司的設定有差異，想請專家解答為什麼公司6310的設定沒有綁定成本中心，卻自動帶出【63101201-採購和商店1(台灣)】？



以上再麻煩解答，謝謝。

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 on the Horizon
entry.content:
@mojunyun 

If you are debugging and you then hit F8 to let it continue processing Java GUI does not switch back to your original session where you started the debug from. Press keys Command-Tilde and you can flip back to the other session. At this point you can now enter /hx to close the debugger session that you've just switched from.

Cheers.

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge - SAP Community Escape House - UI5

entry.title: Re: Object reference not set to instance of an object err...

Hi abdul_wahab4647,

Check SAP Note 3073078 and SAP KBA 3378681 to verify if it helps.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Package.json Script option to force deploy HDI artifacts(Deployement option in SAP HDI)
entry.content:
The SAP HDI Deployer, known as @SAP/hdi-deploy, is a Node.js-based module designed for deploying SAP HANA database artifacts within HDI (HANA Deployment Infrastructure) environments. It facilitates the deployment of HDI-based persistence models and can be utilized in various contexts, including XS Advanced (XSA) and the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) or Cloud Foundry (CF). The HDI Deployer is typically integrated into a database module, where it is specified as a dependency in the package.json file, allowing seamless deployment of design-time artifacts to the respective HDI container.

 

Post the usual upgrade of our server, we had a unique situation in the remote sources. Some of the remote sources were down and on attempting to start them resulting in the following error:

RS[xxxxxx]:Failed to resume CDC replication. Error:com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCDriverException: SAP DBTech JDBC: [345] (at 134): invalid table name: Could not find table/view xxxx_xxxTRIGGER_QUEUE in schema aaa_bbb: line 8 col 23 (at pos 198)

The user aaa_bbb(masked name) is the technical user name, used while configuring the Remote source. The table was a standard table generated by HANA framework. Despite all the possible attempts, our only recourse was the standard fix for all software issues: Recreate and Restart

 

The challenge with the recreation was the more than 200 remote subscriptions under the remote source. Our remote subscriptions were created using the .hdbreptask in our HDI project.

SAP HDI Deployer prevents the deployment of unmodified files due to a feature known as Delta deployment. This functionality ensures that only files that have changed since the last deployment are pushed to the HDI container, optimizing the deployment process and reducing unnecessary overhead.

Once again at the crossroads, we had two options: one to manually make some changes to more than 200 .hdbreptask and push the files as modified to Git repo. This would ensure that the pipeline deploys the modified files. The second option was a search in progress. We finally found the option hidden in package.json.

Deployer options through package.json

The option to force deploy files in the existing HDI project is :

--include-filter <list of files separated by single space> -- treat-unmodified-as-modified

Each file will have a referenced path from the src folder.

ex: src/<folder>/<artifractname>.hdbreptask

Post edit, the package.json shall look as follows:

{

"name": "deploy",

"dependencies": {

"@sap/hdi-deploy": "^4.6"

},

"scripts": {

"start": "node node_modules/@sap/hdi-deploy/deploy.js --auto-undeploy --include-filter src/xxxxxxx/xxxxxxxxxxx.hdbreptask src/xxxxxxxxx/yyyyyyyyy.hdbreptask src/xxxxxxxxx/zzzzzzzzz.hdbreptask --treat-unmodified-as-modified"

}

}

Once the file is prepared, it should be connected to the cloud foundry space and deployed in your container defined through the Business Application Studio.

During the deployment, the console shall display the number of files pushed as modified.

Once the console confirms the response, the file can be pushed to merge and deployed through the pipeline.

Once the deployment is confirmed on the Cloud Transport management service, we will have to reset the package.json file. This step is to avoid the forced deployment of the files in the future.

The option is very useful when one needs to deploy due to scenarios where there is uan pdate in the components on the HANA Cloud server post upgrades ex: Hierarchy engine.

I found the option sleek, clean, and a bit geeky 🙂

Hope you found it useful.

Until next time - Chao.

entry.title: Re: Utilizing Recruiting Talent Pool Functionality for Mass Email Notification to Candidates

Sharna

entry.title: Azure Center for SAP solutions: Running SAP Workloads on Azure
entry.content:
Azure Center for SAP Solutions integrates a range of features designed to deploy and oversee SAP landscapes on Azure portal. The capability within Azure Center for SAP solutions is the creation of a logical representation known as a Virtual Instance for SAP Solutions. This enables users to perceive and engage with the SAP system as a unified entity rather than disparate elements. This virtual instance imparts Azure with an understanding of SAP, introducing advanced functionalities for intelligent SAP management and facilitating guided deployment procedures.

The Azure Center for SAP Solutions was officially made generally available on May 15, 2023. Link for the Official Announcement can be found here.

 

  • Smart and Effortless SAP System Administration
    • Register Windows and Linux ABAP-Based SAP Systems on Azure.
    • Leverage Azure Resource Graph to conduct thorough searches throughout your SAP infrastructure.
    • Initiate start/stop actions for the entire SAP system, including individual instances such as Central Instance, Application Server, Database (HANA), directly from within the Azure interface.
    • Integrated Azure Monitor for SAP solutions offer comprehensive monitoring for SAP systems, covering SAP HANA, SAP NetWeaver and Others
    • Azure Cost Management & Billing provides a summarized cost overview of non-shared resources.
    • Harness Azure Advisor for quality checks, automatically identifying deviations from documented standards and best practices in SAP systems.
  • Assisted SAP Deployment
    • Deploy infrastructure for single, distributed, or High-Availability SAP systems and install S/4HANA, either through automated installation or manual configuration as per specific needs.
    • Customize disk layout and Azure resource names for increased flexibility.
    • Automate SAP system registration using Microsoft’s open-source deployment automation framework—SAP Deployment Automation Framework (SDAF).
    • Visual representation available for the SAP system about to be deployed, enhancing planning and preparation.
  • Other Capabilities
    • Predefined roles and customizable role creation for managing access to specific Azure Center for SAP solutions features like start/stop actions.
    • Extended support for Azure CLI, PowerShell, and SDKs for seamless integration and usage.

Customers and partners have the flexibility to leverage the entire suite of capabilities or select specific functionalities based on their current stage in the cloud adoption journey.

Engaging in a new SAP system deployment project often reveals its inherent complexity. As businesses transition to S/4HANA, the quest for an automated solution that facilitates swift system deployment with minimal maintenance overhead. Azure Center for SAP Solutions now enables customers to deploy an S/4HANA system swiftly—within a few hours—directly via the Azure.

The intricacies of managing an SAP environment often require collaboration across diverse organizational units within a company. By registering existing SAP systems on Azure, customers gain access to the Virtual Instance for SAP Solutions. This logical representation empowers SAP and non-SAP experts by offering comprehensive context while navigating various responsibilities, spanning infrastructure and Basis administration. Moreover, treating SAP as an Azure-native resource allows users to capitalize on Azure’s inherent capabilities.

Azure Virtual Instance for SAP Solutions is accessible across numerous regions of Azure. This offering comes without any extra licensing charges. Customers are exclusively charged for the underlying infrastructure that forms part of the product or services they activate.

Feel free to explore the official documentation for Azure Center for SAP Solutions available here.

Additionally, there are useful links for Overview and Demo videos, providing deeper insights into the product’s functionalities.

entry.title: B2BUnit and B2bcustomer and their assignment
entry.content:
Have some question on B2BUnit and B2bcustomer 

1. How B2BUnit and B2bcustomer assigment works. Can we directly assign them in backoffice?

2. Are many B2BCustomer assignment possible?

3. What is the Role of B2BUsergroup, are they mandatory? What is their purpose

4. B2B Customer is called User in B2B data model?

5. I understand User groups are also called Roles in B2B?

6. There is Customer type as well in Commerce. A profile can be B2BCustomer and Customer as well, why there are two commerce objects for same person?

7. What If I want more relationship like betwen B2BUnit and a Customer, does Commerce provide ootb?

8. Any reason Commerce doesn't have Contact model ïn B2B like in S/4 and C4 Org/Account?

Regards

entry.title: format for ${threshold_cycle_time}
entry.content:
Hi everyone and a happy New Year to you!

The Metric library within Signavio Process Intelligence includes the metric Percentage of cases executed in less than a given time. I'm attempting to use it in one of my dashboards. I am not able to figure out the correct format for the variable ${threshold_cycle_time}, which is used in the metric calculation. As you can see from the screenshot, I assumed the format hh:mm:ss, but that doesn't lead to calculating a result.

I'd appreciate your help. Thanks in advance.

Kind regards,

 

Vladimir

Regards,

entry.title: I have 2 filters plant and material for a PP report, but I'm not able to use werks alone in sap
entry.content:
SELECTION-SCREEN: BEGIN OF BLOCK BLK1.
  PARAMETERS: P_WERKS TYPE MAST-WERKS DEFAULT '1111' OBLIGATORY.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: S_MATNR FOR MAST-MATNR." NO-EXTENSION NO INTERVALS.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: S_STLAL FOR MAST-STLAL NO-DISPLAY." DEFAULT '01' NO INTERVALS.
SELECTION-SCREEN: END OF BLOCK BLK1.
PARAMETERS CHK_M NO-DISPLAY.

entry.title: Is it necessary to separate B1i application and database?
entry.content:
Hey guys familiar with B1i,

I am using B1 10.0 and B1i  1.0.  Recently I’ve encountered issues with B1i performance. The message log keeps reporting "XCE208 Resource is busy" error while handling the event message. It's not always but sometimes. I login the B1i server and it seems the integration service and SQL Server take up most of the memory, reaches to 90%.

I used to be a dotnet developer. In my book, it's always a good design to deploy the application and database to standalone server since they are both memory intense services.

So my question is  should I separate B1i application and database to different server? Is it risky or will be benefit for the B1i performance? It will be great if we have the answer from the B1 official answer.

Thanks!

#SAP B1  #SAP B1i

entry.title: Re: Modification-free Enhancement of AMDP in AS ABAP 7.4 SP08
entry.content:
Hi Community,

" With ABAP 7.4 SP08, the modification-free enhancement of AMDPs is now possible using so-called AMDP BAdIs. The AMDP BAdIs transmit the effect of the switches from the Switch Framework to the implementation of database procedures in the current database. It allows the definition of a clear contract between extension provider and extension consumer (aka implementer) through a dedicated interface. AMDP BAdIs are created in Enhancement Spots in the transaction SE20 and are later called within an AMDP implementation similarly to other AMDPs. "

 

Thanks for your selfless sharing, it really help us  a lot.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: Create customer source of supply in order based planning

entry.title: Re: 401 Unauthorized - Build Apps Unable to Access BTP De...
entry.content:
This is my destination ... notice the URL is only the base endpoint.

These 4 videos shows you the entire process of triggering process from SAP Build Apps, from beginning to end. But if you are failing from Postman, then it would seem something else is wrong, since he destination is not involved there.

Trigger Process from SAP Build Apps #1 (free projects)

Trigger Process from SAP Build Apps #2 - Retrieve Instances

Trigger Process from SAP Build Apps #3 - Retrieve Process Attributes

Trigger Process from SAP Build Apps #4 - Cancel, Suspend, Resume Instances

entry.title: Re: ECC6 T-Code VKM3 error, Fill all the required entry fields
entry.content: Hi, if you not sure which obligatory field to be filled please get help of an ABAPer and set a breakpoint at the specified error message

entry.title: Re: Code Push Down for HANA Starts with ABAP Open SQL
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"  Way to 'Open Magic' : 

  1. Let us first get started :smile: Start using the new Open SQL syntax. Remember it is easy to convert your existing Open SQL statements to new syntax without any side effects.
  2. Use aggregate functions where relevant instead of doing the aggregations in the ABAP layer
  3. Use arithmetic and string expressions within Open SQL statements instead of looping over the data fetched to do the arithmetic and string operations
  4. Use computed columns in order to push down computations that would otherwise be done in a long loops
  5. Use CASE and/or IF..ELSE expressions within the Open SQL in order embed the logic of conditional expression which in the past would have been done after fetching the results from the database. " 

 

Thanks for your kindly sharing, it really help us a lot.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: The 15 Most Important Topics for the ABAP Developer of the Future!
entry.content:
Hello,

- IDOCs are not mentioned. It is still used intensively.

- api.sap.com exposes services that can be very limited or "simplified" compared to IDOC.

Example : api to create inbound deliveries versus IDOC DESADV.

entry.title: Re: Standard Cost recalculate during invoice
entry.content:
Hi,
for a detailed description which condition types are getting recalculated please check this note
24832 - Preisfindungsregeln (KNPRS) / TVCPA / TVCPF - SAP for Me

If you cant find a suitable standard one, please create your own, for example X and use it in copy control.

 

Kind regards

Robert

entry.title: During our recent physical verification, we identified some excess assets that were not part of the
entry.content: During our recent physical verification, we identified some excess assets that were not part of the initial FAR (Fixed Asset Register) master list. These assets need to be included in the FAR master, with their book value determined after considering accumulated depreciation. how to add this asset

entry.title: How to enter a negative amount in the net amount on a purchase order document
entry.content:
On Sales order document it is possible to enter a negative amount for the net amount, but we are looking for a way to enter a negative amount for the net amount on purchase order document as well as on sales order document.

--- Steps to Reproduce ---
1) Access the application "Create Purchase Order Advanced".
2) Enter the supplier and material.
3) Enter the amount to be minus.
4) Net amount is automatically calculated.
5) Error messages appear as shown on the screen.

However, an error occurred when a negative amount was entered for the net amount in the registration of a purchase order document...
See the screenshot below.

Is it possible to enter a negative amount for the net amount on the purchase order document?
If it is possible to enter a negative amount, please let me know the solution.
(I consulted the community, blogs, etc., but could find no compelling information..)

entry.title: 回复： 盤點產生的盤盈虧科目，其所屬的成本中心是判斷什麼設定帶出的？

entry.title: Re: Hana studio : filter attribut in structure
entry.content:
Hello Sebastien,

Please check if the attribute is defined as an navigational attribute. If it is flagged as navigational attribute in the InfoObject, it has to be defined as navigational attribute in the composite provider.

Then, it should be possible to filter.

Good luck.

Best Regards,

Eduard

entry.title: Re: 两家公司皆使用IFRS会计原则，需要激活1GA吗?
entry.content:
兩家公司都是遵照IFRS會計原則；
我的理解是2L分類帳是做集團合併使用的；
集團帳務也是遵照IFRS會計原則。

entry.title: Mandatory attributes and Convention checks in Signavio Process Manager
entry.content:
Hi team and a happy New Year to everyone 🎆!

In our SAP Signavio Process Manager setup/ configuration, we have defined a number of main properties and custom attributes as mandatory, primarily at the diagram level. To enforce their usage, we’ve implemented a custom modeling convention. Section 2.2. of the convention (Definition of mandatory attributes) contains the rules for populating these mandatory attributes. Diagrams that violate modelling conventions (i.e. contain errors) cannot be published (to the Signavio Collaboration Hub)

For instance, in the screenshot provided you can see an example from our workspace. The diagram-level attribute Publisher is not populated, which triggers an error when the Convention check is triggered.

I’m curious to know your practice in this regard.

  1. Do you apply a separate rule for each attribute, or do you cover multiple attributes with a single rule? Could you please share your rationale behind this choice?
  2. Have you received feedback from your modellers regarding the error messages, particularly their clarity in helping the modellers identify and rectify the errors?
  3. Over the years of using Signavio, have you changed your approach to enforcing mandatory attributes? If yes, what factors led to this change?

I eagerly await your response. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Kind regards,

 

Vladimir

entry.title: Re: Custom Price Value Not Updated in Credit Memo Request w.r.t Billing
entry.content: Hi, May you please post a full screenshot of the custom condition type setup of ZUDE?

entry.title: Re: Incorrect Display of License Type in Business User an...

this can not be checked via a community post. Please open a case with the query and mention the component SRD-CC-CI-CCS.

The technical support needs to check this.

entry.title: Re: Ad-hoc Service with T&M billing (Time & Material)
entry.content: Is there a checklist functionality in Service Request, like in Old CRM Service requests

entry.title: Re: Fiscal Year Change in co.code 8810 possible only after year-end closing 2023
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: SAP XI/PI excel to custom RFC
entry.content:
Hi,

it's a problem that i know very well. The signature of the XML-RFC is somewhere cached and i haven't yet found a way to invalid the cache. You have to rename the communication channel that is used - than it's works again. Just a new activation of the CC isn't enough to reload the signature. 

I guess you are consuming an RFC lookup from a mapping, correct? I my case it was a SOAP lookup and giving the channel a new name solved the issue.

BR HElmut

entry.title: Re: 401 Unauthorized - Build Apps Unable to Access BTP De...
entry.content: Thanks Dan For your inputs. I changed Authentication Type to "OAuth2JWTBearer" also I found I missed one step of adding the Destination in the Destination section of SAP Build control Tower. Its working as expected now. But one important thing is in SAP Help Documentation" https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/sap-build-process-automation?q=service+key%22" its clearly mentioned to set authentication type must be set as "OAuth2ClientCredentials" so I followed SAP provided steps

entry.title: Re: 401 Unauthorized - Build Apps Unable to Access BTP De...
entry.content: Thanks Dinu for your Inputs. I changed Authentication Type to "OAuth2JWTBearer" also I found I missed one step of adding the Destination in the Destination section of SAP Build control Tower. Its working as expected now

entry.title: Re: Universal Allocation on the basis of revenue

entry.title: EWAの削除/無効化手順
entry.content:
特定インスタンスのEWA削除手順について、ご連絡をお願いします。

よろしくお願いいたします。

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: EWAの削除/無効化手順
entry.content:
ご担当者　様

平素よりお世話になっております。

ある特定システムのEWA機能を無効化するように、下記操作をご実施頂ければ。

①T-cd：solman＿setup->Application Operations->Earlywatch Alert Management->管理対象システムSIDを選定する->step 2 Activate EWAオプションにチェックを外す➞保存する。
➁管理対象システムのSDCCN➞「To do 」タブに、タスク「Maintenance Package」 と 「SAP Earlywatch Alert」があれば、削除してください。
➂管理対象システムのSDCCN➞メニュー -> Goto -> Settings -> Task-specific->RFC　destinationにて、Solman指定のBACK RFCへの「Active」チェックボクスにチェックを外す➞保存する。

以上、ご確認のほどよろしくお願いいたします。
SAPサポート
ショウセイ

entry.title: Re: EWM - Auto create Warehouse Task from Inbound & Outbound
entry.content:
Hi @Dang_Bao_Van,

Can I create auto WT for only outbound delivery which volume over for example 10 m3 using PPF?

entry.title: Re: In S4, the main table for financial data is ACDOCA, S...
entry.content:
Hello MK,

you might want to have a look at this blog post, where the different roles of ACDOCA and BSEG in S/4HANA are explained. TL;DR: ACDOCA is the universal journal entry in S/4HANA (replacing this role that BSEG had in ECC), BSEG is by and large just an open item registry (+ a data entry view for manually posted FI documents) in S/4HANA. Thus you should summarize the BSEG items as much as possible in S/4HANA.

Kind regards, 

Stefan

entry.title: Re: LE-TRA versus Transportation Management
entry.content:
Hello @Peter2408 

Logistics TM integration is defined in SPRO: Transportation Management -> Integration -> Logistics Integration -> ...

The integration is defined per:

  • sales organization, distribution channel, division, sales doc. type, shipping condition - for sales documents (sales orders mainly)
  • purchasing organization, purchasing group, order type - for purchasing documents
  • shipping point, delivery type, shipping condition - for deliveries.

That is more or less the equivalent of transportation relevance from LE-TRA.

 

Freight unit defines goods transported together. You can view FUs as transpor requirements, goods that need to be shipped.

Freight units are not really obligatory, although they are used in most scenarios. You can have TM create freight orders directly from logistics documents, i.e. sales orders, purchase orders and/or deliveries.

Transportation unit is another object in TM, distinct from freight unit. It is used in load consolidation and it models e.g. containers or trailers. A typical scenario is that freight units are consolidated into transportation units.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Hiring 2 employees on the same position, the first one is successful and the last one is failing
entry.content:
Hi, 

For my new client they are facing issues when hiring two employees on the same position. Both employees are successfully transferred from recruitment to onboarding. The first employee is successfully hired in EC, but the second employee is failing. 

Any thought on what the issue could be?

entry.title: Calling same story different users different colors
entry.content: Two different users call up the same SAP Analytics Cloud Story, the diagram (chart) colors are different for both. Why is that so? The original color is green. For the other user it turns to orange and blue. What could be the reason?
